product_overview: Desain Baju is a browser-based web app for creating custom t-shirt and hoodie designs without installing any software. Users can sign in, start a new apparel design, edit multi-view canvases, save their work, and export or import project files.
core_goals: Create a custom apparel design for an oversize t-shirt or hoodie
Edit designs across multiple garment views: front, back, left, and right
Upload images and add editable text elements to a canvas
Save designs to the user’s account and manage them from a design library
Export finished designs or full project files for reuse
Update user profile information such as username and avatar

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can create an account and sign in to access their designs and editor.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in username -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Choose Google sign-in -> Complete OAuth sign-in -> See the dashboard

features.name: Dashboard and Design Library
features.description: Users can browse, search, and manage their saved designs from a dashboard or full designs list.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View saved designs as cards -> Search designs by title -> Open a design to continue editing
Navigate to /dashboard -> View saved designs as cards -> Start a new design -> Go to product selection
Navigate to /designs -> View all designs in a grid -> Rename a design -> See the updated title
Navigate to /designs -> View all designs in a grid -> Duplicate a design -> See the duplicated design appear in the list
Navigate to /designs -> View all designs in a grid -> Delete a design -> See the design removed from the list

features.name: Product Selection
features.description: Users can choose a garment type before creating a new design.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> View available product types -> Choose an oversize t-shirt or hoodie -> Start a new design -> Open the editor
Navigate to /products -> View available product types -> Choose a product type -> See the new design created and opened in the editor

features.name: Design Editor
features.description: Users can build apparel mockups on a multi-view Fabric.js canvas, edit objects, and save their work.
user_flows: Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Switch between front, back, left, and right views -> Add text or upload an image -> Move, resize, or rotate objects -> Save the design
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Switch to a different view -> Add content to that view -> Switch back to another view -> See each view keep its own independent canvas state
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Select an object -> Edit its properties such as color, font, or opacity -> See the object update on the canvas
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Reorder layers or delete an object -> See the canvas composition change
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Use the keyboard shortcut to duplicate an object -> See a second copy appear on the canvas
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Use the keyboard shortcut to undo or redo an edit -> See the canvas revert or reapply the change
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Import a .wear or JSON project file -> See the project load into the editor
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Export the active view as PNG or JPG -> Download the image file
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Export the full project as .wear -> Download the project file
Navigate to /editor/[id] -> Open a design in the editor -> Wait for autosave or trigger a manual save -> Keep the design stored in the account

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Users can view and update their profile details, including username and avatar.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View current username, avatar, and design count -> Edit the username -> Save the profile changes
Navigate to /profile -> View current username, avatar, and design count -> Upload a new avatar image -> Save the profile changes

features.name: Logout
features.description: Users can sign out of their account from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open the user menu -> Sign out -> See the login page

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, Lucide React, Sonner

routes.description: Landing page with hero section and feature highlights
User login page with email/password and Google OAuth
User dashboard showing all designs with search
Full designs list page with management options
Product selection page to start a new design (oversize t-shirt or hoodie)
User profile page with username and avatar management
OAuth callback handler for Supabase auth

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email/password credentials or Google OAuth
user_interactions: Click Google login button for OAuth
See error message on invalid credentials
Get redirected to dashboard on success

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register a new account with email, password, and optional username
user_interactions: See error message on validation failure
See success message to check email for confirmation

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View and manage all user designs with search functionality
user_interactions: View list of designs as cards
Click design card to open editor
Click "Desain Baru" to go to products page

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase designs table (select with search filter)

features.name: Product Selection
features.description: Choose product type (oversize t-shirt or hoodie) to start a new design
user_interactions: Click "Mulai Desain" on a product card
Get redirected to editor after design is created

features.name: Design Editor
features.description: Multi-view canvas editor for designing clothes using Fabric.js
user_interactions: Upload and place images on canvas

features.name: Designs List
features.description: Full list of all user designs with management options
user_interactions: View all designs in a grid

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update user profile including username and avatar

features.name: Logout
user_interactions: Click logout button in user menu

known_limitations.issue: Middleware file convention is deprecated, should use proxy instead
known_limitations.impact: Warning during build, may affect routing behavior in future Next.js versions

known_limitations.issue: Editor canvas state is stored in Supabase as JSON blob, no version history
